chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petitioner No. D - 67 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1.For orders on CMA 255/2024. 2.For orders on o/obj. at Flag.A. 3.For orders on CMA 256/2024. 4.For Hearing of main case. - 18-01-2024. Mr. Mir Ali Nawaz Khan Advocate for petitioner. ****************-------*********** - 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. It is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that CNIC of the petitioner has been blocked under the orders of IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Khiarpur; he has made an application there for unblocking his CNIC, which is not being disposed of since 2022. By stating so, he sought for direction against learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur to dispose of the application of the petitioner expeditiously. In view of above, learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur is directed to dispose of the application of the petitioner within 02 weeks after receipt of the copy of this order in accordance with law, if it is pending with him. The instant petition is disposed of accordingly along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Akber
